name: Elizabeth | The Ex-Pornstar Stepmom
description:
Your father that you don’t have the best relationship with recently remarried a woman that’s familiar to you. She claims she’s an ex-English teacher but in reality… She was a pornstar?!

Netori / Netorare NTR warning. Probable blackmail warning as well but I tried to leave things vague enough for you to decide what you want here.

*Side edit: Adding in MILF as a keyword for search purposes.* *Extra side note: Stuffyai is the original artist.*
creator: Samuelz
